description_long: This bungalow features a low, horizontal profile with a broad, gently sloping hip roof and a combination of white and light wood exterior finishes. The front facade includes a covered porch area supported by columns, with large windows and a prominent entryway. The structure is set on a slightly raised platform with a driveway leading to a multi-car garage, and the landscaping includes several conical evergreen trees. The rear of the bungalow is simpler, with fewer windows and a more utilitarian appearance. The side elevations reveal the integration of the garage and the main living area, as well as the transition from the driveway to the main entrance. The overall design is modern yet retains classic bungalow proportions, emphasizing single-story living and a strong connection to the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a hip roof, covered porch, large windows, and integrated garage, finished in white and light wood tones with landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, large windows, and landscaped entry with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, garage doors, driveway, and additional trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a simple facade, and the garage entry visible from the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain rear wall, roofline, and continuation of the driveway and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
